message:
chore(ci): refresh certification reports and update beads issue tracker

Regenerate all CI test suite artifacts with updated timestamps from the
latest full suite run:
- cross_platform_reports/linux: platform_events.jsonl, platform_report.json,
  platform_report.md
- ext_conformance/reports: CONFORMANCE_REPORT.md, conformance_summary.json
- full_suite_gate: artifact_retention_report.json,
  certification_events.jsonl, certification_report.md,
  certification_verdict.json, full_suite_events.jsonl, full_suite_report.md,
  full_suite_verdict.json, preflight_verdict.json, waiver_audit.json

All gate statuses unchanged (pass/skip preserved); only timestamps updated.

.beads/issues.jsonl: Close completed beads including fail-closed
primary_outcomes claim-integrity checks (bd-3ar8v.2.8.3) and add new
issues for ongoing work items.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
